mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wallet_record (user_id, reservation_order_id, amount, type, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{record.userId}, #{record.reservationOrderId}, #{record.amount}, #{record.type}, #{record.createTime}, #{record.updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wallet_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM wallet_record WHERE reservation_order_id = #{reservationOrderId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wallet_record WHERE user_id = #{userId}
